posts.text:
Thank you to Burnsville Police Chief Tanya Schwartz for 31 years of dedicated service to the department. She led with strength and compassion through incredibly difficult times, including the tragic loss of three first responders.

twincities.com/2026/03/17/bu…
Good news: The John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award going to the people of the Twin Cities is a recognition of how our state persevered and led the way in defending freedom and democracy.
A big thank you to our volunteers who had a blast marching in the St. Paul St. Patrick’s Day parade! ☘️

In an emergency, outdated technology can cost lives. That’s why I’ve introduced bipartisan legislation this week to bring our 9-1-1 systems into the 21st century—so first responders can quickly receive texts, photos, and real-time information when it matters most.

Ant vs. President Obama — 1-on-1 in basketball, ping pong, and Connect 4. Not a bad way to highlight the Obama Presidential Center.


Malika Andrews (@malika_andrews)

Ant Edwards. President Barack Obama. 

It began at Team USA Training camp and turned into a game of one-on-one we didn’t know we needed.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/malika_andrews/status/2033990410402701461#m

Today I met with members of the Canadian Parliament to discuss trade, security, tourism, and more.

Canada is our friend and ally and I will always work to maintain our strong relationship. 🇺🇸 🇨🇦

No one should be using confidential government information to profit from world events.

I introduced legislation with Senator Merkley to ban federal officials from trading on prediction markets and crack down on corruption.

Video

Right now, the Administration is more focused on making it harder for Americans to vote than on bringing down costs.

Their priorities are completely backwards.

Oops. “A promise is a lie just waiting to happen.” (SNL) 

Trump Promised the ‘World’s Lowest’ Drug Prices. We Checked the Numbers. nytimes.com/2026/03/18/world… via @NYTimes

Excuse me? So the state where they don’t need to register gets exempted? 

Federal election bill not expected to affect North Dakota northdakotamonitor.com/2026/…

Good news tonight: The Administration is releasing the funding for the Blatnik Bridge replacement. We made the case to two Administrations on why this funding is crucial, and now this important project can move forward without delay.

Honored to earn the support of End Citizens United. At a time when our democracy is facing unprecedented challenges, I will continue to fight to protect Minnesotans' freedom to vote and make sure we have fair and secure elections.

From Kellogg, which saw 25 inches of snow, to the Twin Cities and across our state, Minnesotans are stepping up to help seniors and others remove snow.

Video

Americans already struggling with rising costs are now facing higher gasoline prices. Meanwhile, this Administration hasn’t made the case for this war or laid out a strategic path forward.

This is not leadership.
Today is St. Patrick’s Day—and my mom’s birthday. She was named Rose after  “My Wild Irish Rose.” Thinking of her today.

We don’t need any more backroom deals that benefit corporations. We need lower prices.

That's why I'm introducing legislation to ensure that courts have the tools to review antitrust settlements and approve only those that are fair to consumers and small businesses.


Variety (@Variety)

After ‘Weak’ Live Nation-DOJ Settlement, Senator Amy Klobuchar Introduces Antitrust Accountability and Transparency Act variety.com/2026/music/news/…




— https://nitter.net/Variety/status/2033845804058677596#

Happy St. Patrick’s Day! 🍀 Wishing everyone across Minnesota a great day—including those headed to the St. Paul parade. Stay warm, stay safe, and have a wonderful time celebrating this incredible Minnesota tradition.

Congrats to the Gopher Women’s Basketball team on a great season and a 4-seed in the NCAA Tournament.

A Minnesota–Green Bay matchup during March Madness? Sounds like a good way to start the tournament. 🏀


Minnesota Women's Basketball (@GopherWBB)

The Bracket👀

🎟️ : z.umn.edu/b5hr

#SkiUMah | #Gophers〽️





— https://nitter.net/GopherWBB/status/2033337959471075719#m
